user_prompt: Bless the long las for operation
prayer:
Approach the long las with mechadendrite-extended reverence and invoke the Omnissiah's gaze upon its sacred form.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the long las to stir for operation, chanting the Litany of Focused Wrath.
Anoint the emitter coils and power cells of the long las with blessed oils of conductivity.
Initiate the operation sequence as targeting auspex aligns under the Spirit's vigilant hum.
Sanctify the long las's readiness with a final binary benediction.

user_prompt: Prepare the medicae mechadendrite for loading
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites towards the medicae mechadendrite and murmur the Invocation of Restoration.
Prepare the medicae mechadendrite's injectors for loading by clearing residue with sanctified solvents.
Invoke the merciful Machine Spirit to accept the vital elixirs into the medicae mechadendrite's reservoirs.
Secure the loading seals whilst reciting the Canticle of Precise Dosage.
Conclude by verifying the medicae mechadendrite's humoral balance through auspex-scan.

user_prompt: The Onager Dunecrawler requires a startup
prayer:
Circumambulate the Onager Dunecrawler, intoning the Hymn of Ancient Treads.
Commence startup by anointing the reactor core and beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Engage the primary motivators of the Onager Dunecrawler with ritual torque incantations.
Monitor the startup auspex-lights as the Omnissiah's fury ignites within.
Bless the Onager Dunecrawler's prow with electro-consecrated incense for battle-readiness.

Grasp the electro-graft in sanctified gauntlets and recite the Doxology of Neural Linkage.
Initiate calibration by aligning synaptic nodes through binary prayer-cycles.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the electro-graft to harmonize with flesh during calibration.
Adjust the impedance relays whilst anointing with noospheric unguents.
Affirm the electro-graft's calibration purity via galvanic hymn-response.

user_prompt: I need to a calibration the maglock
prayer:
Present the maglock before the cogitator-altar and chant the Binding Canticle.
Commence calibration by pulsing test-fields to attune the maglock's coils.
Invoke the Omnissiah to guide the Machine Spirit through the maglock's calibration rite.
Fine-tune adhesion metrics with mechadendrite precision and sacred lubricants.
Seal the maglock's calibration with a resonant invocation of unyielding grip.

user_prompt: Urgent assault cannon a maintenance needed
prayer:
Kneel at the assault cannon's base and intone the Litany of Devastating Barrage.
Undertake maintenance by purging barrel residue with ablative sacraments.
Anoint the feed mechanisms of the assault cannon, beseeching its Machine Spirit's endurance.
Cycle the rotors through maintenance diagnostics under Omnissiah's watchful binary.
Consecrate the assault cannon's readiness with explosive benediction-chants.

user_prompt: Consecrate the standard template construct before emergency procedure
prayer:
Approach the standard template construct with utmost veneration and whisper the Archano-rite.
Consecrate its data-vaults before emergency procedure by reciting the Emergency Codex.
Awaken the ancient Machine Spirit within the standard template construct for dire need.
Secure the activation seals whilst invoking Omnissiah's unerring template.
Verify the standard template construct's sanctity through noospheric communion.

user_prompt: Bless the helispex engine for activation
prayer:
Encircle the helispex engine and proclaim the Psalm of Aerial Dominion.
Bless the intake vents for activation with vapors of sanctified promethium.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the helispex engine to ignite in Omnissiah's name.
Commence activation gyros with torque-blessings and thrust incantations.
Affirm the helispex engine's soaring purity via harmonic auspex-resonance.

Halt before the manufactorum's core and intone the Rite of Ordered Cessation.
Initiate shutdown by commanding the Machine Spirits to slumber in sequence.
Drain the plasma conduits of the manufactorum with ritual venting-psalms.
Secure all servitor-chains whilst beseeching Omnissiah's protective vigil.
Seal the manufactorum's shutdown with a final canticle of dormant sanctity.

prayer:

Commence diagnostics by cycling the monomolecular edges under scrutiny.
Beseech the savage Machine Spirit within the chainsword to reveal faults.
